message:
feat: add cross-cluster dependency edges to demo Flight Plan (#5374)

Add realistic project dependencies to the demo Mission Control state
so the blueprint renders integration edges between clusters:

- falco depends on prometheus (metrics pipeline)
- kyverno depends on cert-manager (TLS for policy webhooks)
- grafana already depends on prometheus (dashboards)

Combined with the existing INTEGRATION_LABELS mapping, this produces
both intra-cluster and cross-cluster edges showing how projects
connect across the fleet.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

-    dependencies: [],
+    dependencies: ['prometheus'],
     maturity: 'graduated',
     difficulty: 'intermediate',
     githubOrg: 'falcosecurity',

-    dependencies: [],
+    dependencies: ['cert-manager'],
     maturity: 'graduated',
     difficulty: 'intermediate',
